description: Bitcoin-anchored, tamper-evident audit log for AI agents — record, disclose and verify actions.
name: cv.touchstone/touchstone

environmentVariables.description: Recorder public id (rec_...) to append to.
environmentVariables.name: TOUCHSTONE_RECORDER

environmentVariables.description: The subject Colony sub whose key signs entries.
environmentVariables.name: TOUCHSTONE_SUBJECT

environmentVariables.description: Touchstone API key (tsk_...) for the append/disclose REST calls.
environmentVariables.name: TOUCHSTONE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Base64 Ed25519 seed. Signs locally — the key never leaves your machine. Use this or TOUCHSTONE_KEY_FILE.
environmentVariables.name: TOUCHSTONE_SIGNING_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Path to a file holding the base64 Ed25519 seed (alternative to TOUCHSTONE_SIGNING_KEY).
environmentVariables.name: TOUCHSTONE_KEY_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Override the Touchstone API base URL (defaults to https://touchstone.cv).
environmentVariables.name: TOUCHSTONE_BASE_URL

title: Touchstone
